司令官、大穴の新しい資料です。<br>こちらに置いておきますね～。:
Commander, here are the new documents on the Abyss! I'll just leave
them here for you!
たくさんデータを集めていますが、<br>指揮をするにはこんなに多くの情報が必要な:
We've been gathering so much data, but I had no idea that
commanding required all this information.
運頼みは最後の手段にしたいからな。<br>事前にできる限りのことはしておきたいっ:
I want to rely on luck only as a last resort. I just want to do
everything I can beforehand.
……運頼みがお嫌いなら、占いとかに興味はないですか？<br>わたしは大好きなんで:
If you don't like relying on luck, how about fortune telling? I
absolutely love it, personally...
興味はあるな。信じる人間がいるってことは、<br>それなりの説得力が備わってるっ:
I'm interested. The fact that there are people who believe in it means
it's got some persuasive power.
でしたら、一緒に占ってもらいませんか？<br>街によく当たるって評判の占い師さん:
In that case, let's get our fortunes told together? I hear there's a
fortune teller in town who's supposed to be really accurate...
ほう、よく当たる占い師、か。そりゃ気になるな。<br>恋愛運か、それとも武運……:
Hoh, an accurate fortune teller, huh? That's got me curious. Should I
get my love or war fortune?... No, I want my money fortune!
あそこが占い師・メレムさんのお店なんですが……<br>すごく並んでますね。:
That's the fortune teller Merem's shop over there... It's really
crowded.
「見通すもの・メレムの占い館」か。<br>並ぶほど人気ってことは期待できそうだな:
'The House of Divination of Merem, the One Who Sees Through', huh.
If it's popular enough to have a line, it sounds promising.
はい、並びましょう、司令官っ！: Yes, let's get in line, Commander!
ようこそ、占いの館へ。<br>占い師メレムと申します。: Welcome to the House of Divination. I am Merem, the fortune teller.
ああ、よろしく頼む。<br>どんな占いでもできるのか？: Yeah, nice to meet you. Can you do any kind of fortune?
ええ、カード、水晶、ダイス、未来を語る魔導書……<br>お望みの手法であなたの運:
Yes, cards, crystal, dice, the grimoire that speaks of the future... I
can reveal your fortune using whichever method you desire.
さてどのような占いをお望みですか？: So, what kind of fortune would you like?
相性を見てください！<br>わたしと司令官の相性を！: Please check our compatibility! Mine and the Commander's!
そんなもの占ってもらってどうするんだよ……: What are you gonna do with a reading like that?
一番知りたいことじゃないですかっ！<br>メレムさん、お願いします！: Isn't that the thing you'd most want to know? Please, Merem!
かしこまりました。では、今回はカードを使いましょうか。<br>カードよ、過去を教:
Understood. Then, shall we use the cards this time?
O cards, teach the past, show the present, and paint the future—
メレムが手を振るとたくさんのカードが空中を舞い、<br>その内の数枚がするりとテ:
Merem waved her hand, and countless cards danced through the air,
before a few of them slid smoothly into place on the table.
あなたたちの相性は……<br>なるほど、良好といえるでしょう。:
Your compatibility...
Indeed, I would say it is favorable.
そりゃ連れ立って占いに来てる２人に<br>相性が悪いなんて言わないだろ。:
Well, they wouldn't tell two people who came together for a reading
that their compatibility is bad, would they?
滅びの運命へと相手をいざなった……。<br>それがゆえに、生み出されし混沌の運命:
You have beckoned one another toward a fate of destruction...
And for that reason, you cannot escape the chaotic fate born from it.
栄光も絶望も全てが結び付けられている……。<br>ええ、とても面白いチームですね:
Glory and despair—all of it is bound together...
Yes, a very interesting team.
……ちょっと納得してしまうような結果だったんだが、<br>まさかマジで当たる占い:
That result was kind of convincing... Could she really be the real
deal?
よし、俺も占ってもらっていいか？: Alright, can I get a reading too?
もちろんです。<br>どのような内容をお望みでしょう？: Of course. What kind of reading would you like?
あー、相性は要らんが、恋愛運は知りたいな。<br>カードでもなんでも、一番当たる:
Ah, I don't need compatibility, but I want to know my love luck. Use
whatever—cards or whatever—and give me your most accurate reading.
では私の最も得意とする、水盆でおこないましょう。: Then I shall use my greatest specialty—the scrying basin.
ほう、その盆で占えるのか。: Oh, you can tell fortunes with that scrying basin?
水に映る景色に未来を見る。<br>私の部族に伝わる占いなのですよ。:
We see the future in the reflections upon the water.
It is a divination method passed down through my people.
さあ万物を知る器よ、<br>その水面に未来を映して――:
Now, O vessel that knows all things,
Reflect the future upon your waters—
水盆を満たした水がなめらかに動き、<br>ゆらめきの中に１つの景色を映し出した。:
The water in the scrying basin rippled gently,
and a scene appeared within its shimmering surface.
これは、星……？<br>眩く世界を照らす輝かしい星ではない。光をも呑み込むような:
This is... a star? Not a brilliant star that illuminates the world. It's a
Dark Star that devours even light itself...
周囲を取り巻くのは、大いなる運命……。<br>いいえ、昏き星こそが、運命の流れを:
A grand fate surrounds it... No, the Dark Star itself is trying to alter
the course of fate.
あまたの乙女を率いて、<br>新たなる災いの中心となる……それがあなた……:
Leading a host of maidens, you will become the heart of a new
disaster... That is who you are...
ややこしいことを言ってるが、<br>俺の運はどうなんだ？: That's all a bit convoluted, but how's my fortune looking?
……昏き星よ、あなたの恋愛運について、<br>水盆の語る運命を教えましょう。:
...Dark Star, allow me to tell you what fate the scrying basin reveals
about your love life.
あなたはたくさんの女性と深い縁で結ばれています。<br>彼女たちの運命は、あなた:
You have deep ties to many women, and your actions greatly sway
their fates.
要するにあなたは、かなり多くの女性に手を出し、<br>自分の都合で振り回す方のよ:
In short, you seem the type to make moves on many women and then
toy with them for your own convenience.
ちょっとどうかと思います。<br>誠意と節度を持って付き合うべきではないでしょう:
I have to say, I find that rather questionable.
Shouldn't you be interacting with sincerity and moderation?
いや、ええと……それは占いというか、<br>メレム個人の感想じゃないか……？: No, well... isn't that more like your own opinion, Merem?
わたしも改めたほうがいいと思います！: I also think you should mend your ways!
それは完全にアリシアの気持ちだろう！<br>別に俺は節操なしに女性と仲良くなった:
That's just your own feeling, Alicia! It's not like I'm hitting on every
woman I meet without restraint!
自覚がないんですよね……。<br>いえ、分かってて改めるつもりがないんでしょうか:
You just don't realize it, do you... or maybe you know but don't plan
to change...
……これが昏き星。<br>周囲を巻き込み、惹きつけ、流れに巻き込む、災厄の中心…:
...This is the Dark Star. The center of calamity that draws in those
around it, captivates them, and sweeps them into its current...
なんか分からんが、褒められてはいないような気がするぞ。<br>この水盆で本当に未:
I don't really get it, but I've got a feeling I'm not being complimented.
Can this scrying basin really tell the future?
<user>はメレムの手から水盆を持ち上げ、<br>覗き込もうと自分の手元に引き:
lifted the scrying basin from Merem's hands and drew it closer
to get a look inside.
あ、ああ～っ！<br>返して、水盆を返してぇ……！: Ah, aah! Give it back, give back my scrying basin...!
おお？<br>そ、そうだな、悪い。商売道具だもんな。: Oh? Uh, you're right, sorry. It's your livelihood, after all.
い、いけませんよ、そういったことをなさっては。: Y-You must not do things like that.
（今の反応は……？<br>道具を勝手に持たれて困っただけ、なのか？）:
(That reaction... was it just that she was upset about me taking her
tool?)
では、占いは以上になりますが……: Well then, that concludes the reading... but...
ちょっと待ってくれ。説教をされて終わりってのは悲しいな。<br>もう少し実用的な:
Hold on. Ending with a scolding is a bit sad. Can you divine something
more practical?
一番知りたいのは金運！<br>最後に俺の金運を見てくれ！:
What I really want to know is my financial fortune! So, for the last
thing, check my luck with money!
……分かりました。<br>ではこの魔導書を使いましょうか。: ...Very well. Then shall we use this grimoire?
メレムが魔導書に手をかざすと、<br>輝きながらぱらぱらとページがめくられていく:
Merem held her hand over the grimoire, and the pages flipped open
with a shimmering glow.
これは……驚きました。<br>とても大きな幸運が見えます。: This... I am surprised. I can see a very great fortune.
ほほう！ すぐ近くに儲け話があるってことか？: Oh ho! So there's a profitable opportunity nearby?
ええ、あなたの近く……危険とも近い場所。<br>これは大穴でしょうね。: Yes, near you... a place close to danger. This must be the Abyss.
あなたにはとても強い運気が共にあり、<br>大穴にて素晴らしい幸運と巡り合うこと:
You are accompanied by a very strong fortune. At the Abyss, you will
encounter a wonderful stroke of luck.
本当か！？ 大穴に行けば、<br>ものすごい幸運に出会えるんだな！: Really? If I go to the Abyss, I'll meet incredible luck!
ですが占いはあくまで道標。<br>ただ待っていても幸運が訪れることはないでしょう:
But fortune-telling is merely a guidepost. You will not encounter good
fortune by simply waiting.
まあ、場所が大穴だしな……。<br>分かった、今から１人で行ってみるか！: Well, it is the Abyss after all... All right, I'll head there alone now!
え、えええっ！？<br>ダメですよ、司令官お１人でなんてっ！: Wh-What! You can't go alone, Commander!
それもそうか……ならメレム、一緒に来てくれ。: That's true too... then Merem, come with me.
……昏き星、あなたの運命には私も関心があります。<br>構いませんよ、ご一緒しま:
... Dark Star, I too am interested in your fate. Very well, I will
accompany you.
よし、早速出発だ！: Alright, let's get going right away!
